channel.title: Headlines - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:
1. AMD and Meta Announce Expanded Strategic Partnership to Deploy 6 Gigawatts of AMD GPUs  AMD
  2. Meta and AMD announce 6-gigawatt GPU deal as part of AI build-out, AMD stock jumps  Yahoo Finance
  3. Racing to Catch Up With Nvidia, AMD Signs Chips-for-Stock Deal With Meta  The New York Times
  4. Meta strikes AI chip deal with AMD days after committing to deploy millions of Nvidia GPUs  CNBC
  5. Meta and AMD Partner for Longterm AI Infrastructure Agreement  meta.com

item.title: The ‘extreme and improbable’ economics of Citrini’s AI report - Financial Times
item.description:
1. The ‘extreme and improbable’ economics of Citrini’s AI report  Financial Times
  2. ‘A feedback loop with no brake’: how an AI doomsday report shook US markets  The Guardian
  3. The Stock Market Could Crash in an AI Doomsday Scenario, According to Analysts. Wall Street Is Panicking.  Yahoo Finance
  4. Breaking Down the Doomsday AI Memo That Spooked Markets  WSJ
  5. Citrini Post Author Maps Out Playbook to Deal With AI Disruption  Bloomberg

1. Years ago, novelist Tayari Jones snuck into a writing class. It changed her life  NPR

item.title: More Than Half of Teens Use Chatbots for Schoolwork, Survey Finds - The New York Times

  4. Parents are underestimating their teens’ use of AI chatbots: Survey  The Hill

item.title: Sundance confirms 2027 Boulder debut details - Axios

item.title: Robert Carradine, 'Revenge of the Nerds' and 'Lizzie McGuire' star, dies at 71 - PBS
item.description:
1. Robert Carradine, 'Revenge of the Nerds' and 'Lizzie McGuire' star, dies at 71  PBS
  2. Robert Carradine Dies: ‘Long Riders’, ‘Revenge Of The Nerds’ & ‘Lizzie McGuire’ Actor Was 71  Deadline
  3. Robert Carradine, actor in ‘Revenge of the Nerds’ and ‘Lizzie McGuire,’ dies at 71  CNN
  4. Jamie Lee Curtis Mourns 'First Love' Robert Carradine After His Death: 'We Became a Little Family'  People.com
  5. Ever Carradine, Martha Plimpton, Hilary Duff and more remember Robert Carradine  AP News

item.title: Trump to announce data center energy deals during State of the Union - Politico
item.description:
1. Trump to announce data center energy deals during State of the Union  Politico
  2. Trump to announce electricity ‘rate payer protection pledges’ from Big Tech  The Hill
  3. Trump announces deal for data centers as Florida moves to rein them in  Miami Herald
  4. Trump says he has told big tech companies to build their own power plants  Reuters
  5. Trump Seeks Vows From Tech Firms to Cover Data Center Costs  Bloomberg
